features.title: SourceVision visual assets
features.description: Ensure proper display of branding and visual elements in the SourceVision interface

tasks.title: Fix logo rendering in SourceVision UI
tasks.description: Debug and resolve issues preventing the SourceVision logo from displaying correctly in the user interface
acceptanceCriteria: Logo displays correctly in all supported browsers
Logo scales appropriately on different screen sizes
Logo loads without console errors or broken image indicators
